title: About
lead: LetterLab is a focused writing tool built to reduce friction in professional communication. The goal is simple: help users draft better messages faster, with clear control over tone and structure.

sections.title: The problem
body: Professional email is essential but time-consuming. Tone is easy to get wrong; structure is often unclear. Many tools add complexity instead of reducing it.

sections.title: The approach
body: We focus on clarity, control, and predictability. Our principles: clarity over cleverness, controls over surprises, and predictable structure so you stay in charge.

items.title: Idea and research
items.body: Identifying pain points in professional email and drafting workflows.

items.title: First version
items.body: Initial drafting, tone control, and email integration (Gmail, Outlook).

items.title: Footer and transparency
items.body: Documentation, help center, status page, and legal pages added.

items.title: Iteration
items.body: We continue to improve based on feedback and real usage.

items.title: Clarity first
items.body: Every feature should make the message easier to read and act on, not harder.

items.title: User in control
items.body: You decide what to send. We suggest; we don’t auto-send or hide choices.

items.title: Predictable behavior
items.body: The product should behave in ways you can anticipate. No surprise rewrites or tone shifts.

items.title: Minimal friction
items.body: Fewer steps, clear options, and visible constraints beat a crowded interface.

items.title: Honest communication
items.body: We communicate limits, changes, and trade-offs clearly. No dark patterns.
